title: Instruction Manual
text:
## Instruction Manual

**WARNING:** Do not {verb} this {object} near water, bees, or emotional {adjective} people.

**Step A:** Insert the {object} into slot {number} until you hear a {adjective} sound.

**Step B:** Press the {color} button firmly with your {body part}.

**Step C:** Wait {number} minutes while the device becomes {adjective}.

**Step D:** If smoke appears, {verb} calmly toward the nearest {place}.

**Maintenance:** Clean with a {adjective} cloth every {number} days.

**Support:** Questions? Call our {adjective} support line and ask for {person}.
